nasb.text: Others were saying, “This is the Christ.” Still others were saying, “Surely the Christ is not going to come from Galilee, is He?

esv.text: Others said, “This is the Christ.” But some said, “Is the Christ to come from Galilee?

cnv.text: 另有人說：“他是基督。”還有人說：“基督是從加利利出來的嗎？

ccb.text: 也有些人说：“祂是基督。”还有些人说：“不会吧，基督怎么会出自加利利呢？

csbs.text: 另有的说：“这个人就是基督。”还有的却说：“难道基督会出自加利利吗？
